arts.ttl: Danny Ings makes West Ham exit decision after late Fulham goal
arts.sum: Danny Ings was West Ham’s saviour at the weekend, pouncing on a loose ball to fire home an injury-time equaliser at Fulham to deny the Cottagers a deserved home win. The goal can be considered a collectors item, given that it was only his fifth in 54 Hammers appearances per transfermarkt. arts.ttl: Reiss Nelson set for first Fulham start following Arsenal exit
arts.sum: Nelson impressed off the bench against West Ham at the weekend and is in line to start for the Cottagers in the Carabao Cup clash with Preston
